name: 10_both_inputs_zero
description: Both inputs are zero -> raw is 0.0 -> clamped to VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX = -0.5. The 'no information' degenerate case still produces a valid, safe (most-cautious) bleed threshold.
derivation: raw = -(0.0 * 0.0) = -0.0 (== 0.0). min(-0.5, 0.0) = -0.5. max(-3.0, -0.5) = -0.5. With both inputs zero the function still returns a usable bleed threshold pinned to the conservative upper bound; no division, no NaN.
